heading: Acceptance of membership
label: 283aa Acceptance of membership
text: The President is hereby authorized to accept membership for the United States in the Inter-American Investment Corporation (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “Corporation”) provided for by the agreement establishing the Corporation (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “agreement”) deposited in the archives of the Inter-American Development Bank.
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 202 of title II of S. 2416, Ninety-eighth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Mar. 13, 1984Pub. L. 98–473
